Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Akura Fury]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 2''' — Akura Fury was a legendary Akura clan pillar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 12''' — Akura Fury won the Uncrowned King tournament one year.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Akura Fury is a genius in the line of Malice who failed to activate the first book.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — Akura Fury has bright red eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — Akura Fury is the uncle of Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — Akura Fury has the power to decide competitors for the Uncrowned King team.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — Akura Fury is a Herald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 5''' — Akura Fury has wild, shadowy hair and bright red eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 5''' — Akura Fury is the only direct descendant of Akura Malice to have reached the Herald stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 5''' — Akura Fury is known for waging war singlehandedly and toppling cities with his techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 5''' — Akura Fury has a bounty on his head from the Eight-Man Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — The gold dragon's power rivals Akura Fury's.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — Akura Fury uses shadow madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Akura Fury is a character who was curious about Lindon's suggestion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — Akura Fury taught Lindon how to layer techniques.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Akura Fury is part of Mercy's family and is described as uncontrollable.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Akura Fury drifted higher into the air over the Sky's Edge fortress.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Akura Fury is advancing to Monarch.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 3''' — Akura Fury is known for shirking duty unless it involves advancement or combat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 3''' — Akura Fury uses a technique that creates a blue circular doorway leading to another world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 3''' — Akura Fury's technique involves a blue substance that looks like a patchwork of every shade of blue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Akura Fury cost the cults more than they expected to spend.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — Akura Fury is someone Redmoon has crossed blows with.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Akura Fury was a Herald for a long time.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — Akura Fury is a recruit in the Wolf Division on the verge of promotion to two-star.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Akura Fury is a new recruit of the Wolf Division.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Akura Fury wears the seamless white armor of the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Akura Fury has shadow-like hair and crimson eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Akura Fury is quick to adapt.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
